snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Firfirey | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Finally releasing 'Firfirey' after 6 years feels a lot, but here we are. I hope this brings back good memories to you as it does to me. This song resonates of pure love and the emotions it holds is immense for me. I can't believe we've come this far.

Thank you for always being a part of the journey !

Written, composed and performed by Yabesh Thapa 

Flute - Shrijan Maharjan
Drums and Additional Percussions - Bikesh Bazra
Mix/Master - Kobid Bazra (Bajra Creation Records)

Visuals by Noisy

Get connected with us
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/?hl=en

#ghaamchhaya

snippet.title: аӨ®аӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаҘҖаӨўаӨјаҘҖ аӨҡаӨўаӨј аӨҡаӨўаӨј аӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аҘӮ | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan | Naga Navtra | Paru Rabari
snippet.description:
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ 1960 аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ вҖ” аӨңаӨ¬ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҰаӨ—аҘҖ аӨҘаҘҖ, аӨңаӨңаӨјаҘҚаӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ—аӨ№аӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨҘаҘҖ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ№аӨ° аӨ¶аӨ¬аҘҚаӨҰ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӣаӨҝаӨӘаҘҖ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаҘҖ аӨҘаҘҖаҘӨ
аӨҮаӨё аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨңаӨјаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ№аӨ® аӨүаӨёаҘҖ аӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨ№аӨ• аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ¶аӨҝаӨ¶ аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ

рҹ’« вҖңOld is not just goldвҖҰ itвҖҷs emotion.вҖқ рҹ’«

вҮЁSong : аӨ®аӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаҘҖаӨўаӨјаҘҖ аӨҡаӨўаӨј аӨҡаӨўаӨј аӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аҘӮ | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan

hi.title: аӨ®аӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаҘҖаӨўаӨјаҘҖ аӨҡаӨўаӨј аӨҡаӨўаӨј аӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аҘӮ | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan | Naga Navtra | Paru Rabari
hi.description:
аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ 1960 аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨ№аӨ°аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ вҖ” аӨңаӨ¬ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҰаӨ—аҘҖ аӨҘаҘҖ, аӨңаӨңаӨјаҘҚаӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ—аӨ№аӨ°аӨҫаӨҲ аӨҘаҘҖ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ№аӨ° аӨ¶аӨ¬аҘҚаӨҰ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӣаӨҝаӨӘаҘҖ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаҘҖ аӨҘаҘҖаҘӨ
аӨҮаӨё аӨ—аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨңаӨјаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ№аӨ® аӨүаӨёаҘҖ аӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ®аӨ№аӨ• аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҶаӨң аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаӨјаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ¶аӨҝаӨ¶ аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ

рҹ’« вҖңOld is not just goldвҖҰ itвҖҷs emotion.вҖқ рҹ’«

вҮЁSong : аӨ®аӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаҘҖаӨўаӨјаҘҖ аӨҡаӨўаӨј аӨҡаӨўаӨј аӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аҘӮ | Ek Mulakat Jaruri Hai sajan

snippet.title: DAKSHIN BHARTIYA BAHU OFFICIAL TRAILER I аӨҰаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨЈ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖаӨҜ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘӮ I ANJANA SINGH I NEW BHOJPURI MOVIE 2026
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #rakeshbabu #amitshukla #vidhyasingh #dakshinbhartiyabahu #trailer #bhojpurimovie #b4ubhojpuri #bhojpuri #upcomingbhojpurifilm 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH ACTUAL MOVIES LLP 

аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® вҖ“ аӨҰаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨЈ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖаӨҜ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘӮ (аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® )
аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° вҖ“ аӨ…аӨӮаӨңаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ°аӨҫаӨ•аҘҮаӨ¶  аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ¬аҘӮ  ,аӨ…аӨ®аӨҝаӨӨ  аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҫ ,аӨөаӨҝаӨҰаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ®  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ  , аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒ  аӨ“аӨқаӨҫ , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ¶  аӨңаҘҲаӨё , аӨ°аӨҫаӨ® аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ¬аҘӮ  аӨ•аӨӮаӨҡаҘҮаӨ°аҘҚаӨІ  , аӨңаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨЎаҘӮ  , аӨңаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨ°аӨҫаӨө 
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°  вҖ“ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ
аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ 
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨөаҘҖаӨЈ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨ—аҘҒаӨЎаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ - аӨ…аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°- аӨ“аӨ® аӨқаӨҫ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ ,  
аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ -  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨаӨ® аӨЁаӨҫаӨҮаӨ•
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ - аӨҶаӨҲ аӨ«аҘӢаӨ•аӨё аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ
аӨёаӨ№аӨҫаӨҜаӨ• аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•   вҖ“ аӨ°аӨөаӨҝ  аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ  , аӨ®аҘҮаӨңаӨ°  аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ
аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ- аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ°аӨІаӨҫ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° - аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨөаҘҖаӨЈ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨІаӨҫаӨ°
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° - аӨ…аӨөаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ°аӨҫаӨҜ
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨ…аӨөаӨҝаӨЁаӨҫаӨ¶ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ№аӨ°аӨҫ
аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“ IVY ENTERTAINMENT
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ

B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө 
B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨёаӨҫаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаӨҫаӨ°

FILM- DAKSHIN BHARTIYA BAHU  (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- ANJANA SINGH , RAKESH BABU ,AMIT SHUKLA ,VIDHYA SINGH , PREM DUBEY , ANU OJHA, PRAKASH JAIS, RAMBABU KANCHARLA , JAYA NAIDU , JAYA RAO 
CHILD ARTIST вҖ“ SWASTIKA

LYRICS вҖ“ ARBIND TIWARI, NRIPJEET SINGH  
 EDITOR- PRITAM NAYAK
CINEMATOGRAPHER-MAHI SERLA

ART DIRECTOR- AVDHESH RAI

localized.description:
#anjanasingh #rakeshbabu #amitshukla #vidhyasingh #dakshinbhartiyabahu #trailer #bhojpurimovie #b4ubhojpuri #bhojpuri #upcomingbhojpurifilm 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH ACTUAL MOVIES LLP 

аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® вҖ“ аӨҰаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨЈ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖаӨҜ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘӮ (аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® )
аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° вҖ“ аӨ…аӨӮаӨңаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨ°аӨҫаӨ•аҘҮаӨ¶  аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ¬аҘӮ  ,аӨ…аӨ®аӨҝаӨӨ  аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҫ ,аӨөаӨҝаӨҰаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№  , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ®  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ  , аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒ  аӨ“аӨқаӨҫ , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ¶  аӨңаҘҲаӨё , аӨ°аӨҫаӨ® аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ¬аҘӮ  аӨ•аӨӮаӨҡаҘҮаӨ°аҘҚаӨІ  , аӨңаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨЎаҘӮ  , аӨңаӨҜаӨҫ  аӨ°аӨҫаӨө 
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°  вҖ“ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ
аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ 
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨөаҘҖаӨЈ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨ—аҘҒаӨЎаҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫ - аӨ…аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°- аӨ“аӨ® аӨқаӨҫ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ ,  
аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ -  аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨаӨ® аӨЁаӨҫаӨҮаӨ•
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ - аӨҶаӨҲ аӨ«аҘӢаӨ•аӨё аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ
аӨёаӨ№аӨҫаӨҜаӨ• аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ•   вҖ“ аӨ°аӨөаӨҝ  аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ  , аӨ®аҘҮаӨңаӨ°  аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ
аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ- аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ°аӨІаӨҫ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° - аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨөаҘҖаӨЈ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨІаӨҫаӨ°
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° - аӨ…аӨөаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ°аӨҫаӨҜ
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨ…аӨөаӨҝаӨЁаӨҫаӨ¶ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ№аӨ°аӨҫ
аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ• вҖ“ IVY ENTERTAINMENT
аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ

B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ, аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө 
B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨёаӨҫаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаӨҫаӨ°

snippet.title: Vadh 2 - Official Trailer | Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta | Jaspal Singh Sandhu | Luv Films | 6th Feb
snippet.description:
An old prison guard- Shambhunath Mishra (Sanjay Mishra) and a jail inmate- Manju Singh (Neena Gupta) share a bond forged behind prison walls. 

When their ordinary lives are pulled into a moral conflict and truth refuses to surface, they stand at the centre of a choice that has consequences.

#Vadh2 #SanjayMishra #NeenaGupta

A Luv Films presentation, Vadh 2 is written and directed by Jaspal Singh Sandhu and produced by Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg. The film is slated for a theatrical release on 6th February 2026.

Starring: Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta with Kumud Mishra, Amitt K. Singh, Akshay Dogra, Shilpa Shukla & Yogita Bihani
Written & Directed By: Jaspal Singh Sandhu
Produced By: Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg

snippet.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
snippet.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

рқ‘Ёрқ’ғрқ’җрқ’–рқ’• рқ’•рқ’үрқ’Ҷ рқ‘Ҫрқ’Ҡрқ’…рқ’Ҷрқ’җ :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldnвҖҷt resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

рҹ‘ү рқ‘әрқ’–рқ’ғрқ’”рқ’„рқ’“рқ’Ҡрқ’ғрқ’Ҷ рқ’•рқ’җ @рқ‘№рқ‘«рқ‘Әрқ‘ҙрқ’Ҷрқ’Қрқ’җрқ’…рқ’Ҡрқ’Ҷрқ’” рқ’Үрқ’җрқ’“ рқ’Һрқ’җрқ’“рқ’Ҷ рқ’“рқ’җрқ’Һрқ’Ӯрқ’Ҹрқ’•рқ’Ҡрқ’„ рқ’үрқ’Ҡрқ’•рқ’” рқ’Ӯрқ’Ҹрқ’… рқ’Ҹрқ’Ҷрқ’ҳ рқ’“рқ’Ҷрқ’Қрқ’Ҷрқ’Ӯрқ’”рқ’Ҷрқ’”!

рҹҺ¶ рқ‘әрқ‘¶рқ‘өрқ‘® рқ‘Әрқ‘№рқ‘¬рқ‘«рқ‘°рқ‘»рқ‘ә :-
Singer:  Krish & Kishore Mondal 
Starring: Sanam Johar & Ashi Singh
Lyrics: Kunaal Vermaa
Producer: Durgaram Choudhary
Music Composer: Devv Sadaana
Music Arrangement & Programming: Sharan Rawat
Mixing & Mastering: Bhasker Sarma @ Euphony Studio
В©пёҸ Koo Koo Tv 
Digital Partner: RDC Media

рқ‘ірқ‘°рқ‘Ірқ‘¬, рҹ’¬ рқ‘Әрқ‘¶рқ‘ҙрқ‘ҙрқ‘¬рқ‘өрқ‘» рқ’ҡрқ’җрқ’–рқ’“ рқ’Үрқ’Ӯрқ’—рқ’җрқ’“рқ’Ҡрқ’•рқ’Ҷ рқ’Қрқ’Ҡрқ’Ҹрқ’Ҷ, рқ’Ӯрқ’Ҹрқ’… рҹ”Ғ рқ‘әрқ‘Ҝрқ‘Ёрқ‘№рқ‘¬ рқ’Ҡрқ’• рқ’ҳрқ’Ҡрқ’•рқ’ү рқ’ҡрқ’җрқ’–рқ’“ рқ’Үрқ’“рқ’Ҡрқ’Ҷрқ’Ҹрқ’…рқ’”.

рҹҺ¬ рқ‘Әрқ‘Ёрқ‘әрқ‘» & рқ‘Әрқ‘№рқ‘¬рқ‘ҫ :-
Director: Honey
Choreographer: Debu
Director of Photography (DOP): Karan
Project Head: Israr Ahmad
Video Creator: Screenshot Digital

Assistant Directors:
Shivani, Mukesh Tiwari

Still Photography & BTS: Chand Khan
DI (Colorist): Aman Kumar Kashyap
VFX: Mega Motion

Make-up & Hair: Guddu

Post Production: Screenshot Digital Studio
Editor: Aaditya Jangid
Art Director: Manoj Bhoyar

Production Executive: Ghani
Dressman: Sujeet
Costume Stylist: Adil Apperal
Dancer Costumes: Nishita
Dancer Management: Nikunj

Spot Boys: Anis, Madan

рқ‘ірқ’ҡрқ’“рқ’Ҡрқ’„рқ’” :
Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye

Na dil se vo yaadein jaayein
Na raaton ko neendein aayein
Aate hain phir khwab kyu
Aate hain kyu khaab
Jo thi tere ishq mein doobi
Un ankhon mein tum le aaye
Aasu behisaab kyu
Aasu behisaab
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Inkaar ke bahaane kayi baar karte karte

Humne wahin lagaya dil
Jahaan dil lagana mana tha
Akhir wahin kiye sajde jahan
Sar jhukana mana tha
Kyu zindagi bita di jahaan pe
ik pal bitaana mana tha
Kyu us gali mein rehte they hum
Jahaan roz jaana mana tha

Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye
Jo duaayein dete they
Haan usi ke hothon se
Aise waise lafz bhi
Humse bole hain gaye

baitho kisi roz tanhai mein
Rakho samne wakt ke aaine
Jo aagea chehra nazar vo kahin
Tumhe bewafa kehke has na pade

Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe
Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe

Humne jalaaya dil jahaan diye bhi jalaana mana tha
Kar baithe yaad vo chehra jisko bhulaana mana tha
Hum aazmaye gaye magar unhe aazmana mana tha
Humne wahin lagaya dil jahan dil lagana mana tha

Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye
Jo duaayein dete they
Haan usi ke hothon se
Aise waise lafz bhi
Humse bole hain gaye

en.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
en.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

рқ‘Ёрқ’ғрқ’җрқ’–рқ’• рқ’•рқ’үрқ’Ҷ рқ‘Ҫрқ’Ҡрқ’…рқ’Ҷрқ’җ :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldnвҖҷt resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known. The film tells the story of Michael JacksonвҖҷs life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world. Highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career, the film gives audiences a front-row seat to Michael Jackson as never before. This is where his story begins.

La pelГӯcula narra la vida de Michael Jackson mГЎs allГЎ de la mГәsica, recorriendo su trayectoria desde el descubrimiento de su extraordinario talento como lГӯder de los Jackson Five hasta convertirse en el artista visionario cuya ambiciГіn creativa impulsГі una bГәsqueda incansable para convertirse en el artista mГЎs grande del mundo. Destacando tanto su vida fuera del escenario como algunas de las actuaciones mГЎs icГіnicas de sus inicios como solista, la pelГӯcula ofrece al pГәblico un lugar en primera fila para ver a Michael Jackson como nunca antes. #MichaelMovie

MICHAEL adalah penggambaran sinematik tentang kehidupan dan warisan salah satu seniman paling berpengaruh yang pernah dikenal dunia. Film ini mengisahkan kehidupan Michael Jackson di luar musik, menelusuri perjalanannya dari penemuan bakat luar biasanya sebagai vokalis utama Jackson Five, hingga menjadi seniman visioner yang ambisi kreatifnya mendorong pengejaran tanpa henti untuk menjadi penghibur terbesar di dunia. Menyoroti kehidupannya di luar panggung dan beberapa penampilan paling ikonik dari awal karier solonya, film ini memberi penonton kesempatan untuk menyaksikan Michael Jackson dari dekat seperti belum pernah terjadi sebelumnya. Di sinilah kisahnya dimulai.

snippet.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Everybody wants this. 

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci return in The Devil Wears Prada 2, in theaters May 1. Watch the full trailer now. 

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and NigelвҖ”Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as вҖңLilyвҖқ and вҖңIrvвҖқ from the first film. 
 
вҖңThe Devil Wears Prada 2вҖқ is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

it.title: Il diavolo veste Prada 2 | Trailer ufficiale
it.description:
Tutti lo vogliono.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci tornano ne Il diavolo veste Prada 2, nelle sale dal 1В° maggio. Guarda subito il trailer completo.

Quasi 20 anni dopo la loro iconica interpretazione di Miranda, Andy, Emily e Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci tornano nelle strade alla moda di New York e negli eleganti uffici di Runway Magazine nell'attesissimo sequel del fenomeno del 2006 che ha definito una generazione.

Il film riunisce il cast principale originale con il regista David Frankel e la sceneggiatrice Aline Brosh McKenna, e introduce una passerella di personaggi completamente nuova, tra cui Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak e Conrad Ricamora. Anche Tracie Thoms e Tibor Feldman riprendono i ruoli di "Lily" e "Irv" del primo film.

"Il diavolo veste Prada 2" ГЁ prodotto da Wendy Finerman e i produttori esecutivi sono Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt e Aline Brosh McKenna. Il film debutterГ  in esclusiva nelle sale il 1В° maggio.

аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨІ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӘ, аӨҗаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨҘаӨөаҘҮ, аӨҸаӨ®аӨҝаӨІаҘҖ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨІаҘҖ аӨҹаҘҒаӨҡаҘҖ 'аӨҰ аӨЎаҘҮаӨөаӨҝаӨІ аӨөаӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аҘҚаӨё аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨЎаӨҫ 2' аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨөаӨҫаӨӘаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨңаҘӢ 1 аӨ®аӨҲ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨ®аӨҫаӨҳаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨІаҘҖаӨңаӨј аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨІаӨ° аӨ…аӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ

аӨ®аӨҝаӨ°аӨҫаӨӮаӨЎаӨҫ, аӨҸаӨӮаӨЎаҘҖ, аӨҸаӨ®аӨҝаӨІаҘҖ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЁаӨҝаӨ—аҘҮаӨІ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨ—аӨҫаӨ° аӨӯаҘӮаӨ®аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨ—аӨӯаӨ— 20 аӨёаӨҫаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨІ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӘ, аӨҗаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаӨҘаӨөаҘҮ, аӨҸаӨ®аӨҝаӨІаҘҖ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨІаҘҖ аӨҹаҘҒаӨҡаҘҖ аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨҜаҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨ• аӨ¶аӨ№аӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ«аҘҲаӨ¶аӨЁаҘҮаӨ¬аӨІ аӨёаӨЎаӨјаӨ•аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ°аӨЁаӨөаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨ—аӨңаӨјаҘҖаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨЁаӨҰаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨІаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨІаҘҢаӨҹ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ 2006 аӨ•аҘҖ аӨүаӨё аӨёаӨЁаӨёаӨЁаҘҖаӨ–аҘҮаӨң аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаҘҖаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨёаҘҖаӨ•аҘҚаӨөаӨІ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨӘаҘҖаӨўаӨјаҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаӨ°аӨҝаӨӯаӨҫаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҘаӨҫаҘӨ

аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аҘӮаӨІ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• аӨЎаҘҮаӨөаӨҝаӨЎ аӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҲаӨӮаӨ•аӨІ аӨ”аӨ° аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ аӨҸаӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аҘүаӨ¶ аӨ®аҘҲаӨ•аӨ•аҘҮаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘҒаӨЎаӨјаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аҘҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨҘ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаӨҳ, аӨёаӨҝаӨ®аҘӢаӨЁ аӨҸаӨ¶аӨІаҘҮ, аӨңаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨҝаӨЁ аӨҘаҘҮаӨ°аҘүаӨ•аҘҚаӨё, аӨІаҘӮаӨёаҘҖ аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаҘӮ, аӨӘаҘҲаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ®аҘҚаӨ®аӨІ, аӨ•аӨҫаӨІаҘҮаӨ¬ аӨ№аҘҖаӨ°аҘүаӨЁ, аӨ№аҘҮаӨІаҘҮаӨЁ аӨңаҘҮ. аӨ¶аҘҮаӨЁ, аӨӘаҘүаӨІаҘҖаӨЁ аӨҡаӨҫаӨІаӨ®аҘҮаӨҹ, аӨ¬аҘҖ.аӨңаҘҮ. аӨЁаҘӢаӨөаӨҫаӨ• аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аҘүаӨЁаӨ°аӨҫаӨЎ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаӨ№аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨҲ аӨЁаӨҸ аӨ•аӨҝаӨ°аӨҰаӨҫаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨёаҘҖ аӨҘаҘүаӨ®аҘҚаӨё аӨ”аӨ° аӨҹаӨҝаӨ¬аҘӢаӨ° аӨ«аҘҮаӨІаҘҚаӨЎаӨ®аҘҲаӨЁ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ "аӨІаӨҝаӨІаҘҖ" аӨ”аӨ° "аӨҮаӨ°аҘҚаӨө" аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӯаҘӮаӨ®аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҰаҘӢаӨ№аӨ°аӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ

"аӨҰ аӨЎаҘҮаӨөаӨҝаӨІ аӨөаӨҝаӨҜаӨ°аҘҚаӨё аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨЎаӨҫ 2" аӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨЈ аӨөаҘҮаӨӮаӨЎаҘҖ аӨ«аӨҝаӨЁаӨ°аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аӨҫаӨҮаӨ•аӨІ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨЎаӨ°аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁ, аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁ аӨ°аҘӢаӨёаҘҮаӨЁаӨ«аҘҮаӨІаҘҚаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҸаӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аҘүаӨ¶ аӨ®аҘҲаӨ•аӨ•аҘҮаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ«аӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® 1 аӨ®аӨҲ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨ®аӨҫаӨҳаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨІаҘҖаӨң аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

es-US.title: El diablo viste de Prada 2 | TrГЎiler oficial
es-US.description:
Todos lo desean.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt y Stanley Tucci regresan en El Diablo Viste a la Moda 2, en cines el 1 de mayo. ВЎNo te pierdas el trГЎiler completo!

Casi 20 aГұos despuГ©s de su icГіnico papel como Miranda, Andy, Emily y Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt y Stanley Tucci regresan a las elegantes calles de Nueva York y a las elegantes oficinas de la revista Runway en la esperadГӯsima secuela del fenГіmeno de 2006 que definiГі a una generaciГіn.

La pelГӯcula reГәne al reparto principal original con el director David Frankel y la guionista Aline Brosh McKenna, y presenta una pasarela completamente nueva con personajes como Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak y Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms y Tibor Feldman tambiГ©n repiten sus papeles de "Lily" e "Irv" de la primera pelГӯcula.

"El Diablo Viste a la Moda 2" es producida por Wendy Finerman y cuenta con la producciГіn ejecutiva de Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt y Aline Brosh McKenna. La pelГӯcula se estrena en exclusiva en cines el 1 de mayo.

pt-BR.title: O Diabo Veste Prada 2 | Trailer Oficial
pt-BR.description:
Todo mundo quer isso.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci retornam em O Diabo Veste Prada 2, nos cinemas em 1Вә de maio. Assista ao trailer completo agora.

Quase 20 anos depois de suas interpretaГ§Гөes icГҙnicas como Miranda, Andy, Emily e Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci retornam Г s ruas elegantes de Nova York e aos escritГіrios sofisticados da revista Runway na aguardada sequГӘncia do fenГҙmeno de 2006 que definiu uma geraГ§ГЈo.

O filme reГәne o elenco principal original com o diretor David Frankel e a roteirista Aline Brosh McKenna, e apresenta um elenco totalmente novo, incluindo Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak e Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms e Tibor Feldman tambГ©m reprisam seus papГ©is como вҖңLilyвҖқ e вҖңIrvвҖқ do primeiro filme.

вҖңO Diabo Veste Prada 2вҖқ Г© produzido por Wendy Finerman e tem produГ§ГЈo executiva de Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt e Aline Brosh McKenna. O filme estreia exclusivamente nos cinemas em 1Вә de maio.

id.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Trailer Resmi
id.description:
Semua orang menginginkan ini.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali dalam The Devil Wears Prada 2, tayang di bioskop 1 Mei. Saksikan trailer lengkapnya sekarang.

Hampir 20 tahun setelah memerankan Miranda, Andy, Emily, dan NigelвҖ”Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali ke jalanan kota New York yang modis dan kantor-kantor mewah Majalah Runway dalam sekuel yang sangat dinantikan dari fenomena tahun 2006 yang mendefinisikan satu generasi.

Film ini menyatukan kembali para pemeran utama asli dengan sutradara David Frankel dan penulis Aline Brosh McKenna, dan memperkenalkan deretan karakter baru termasuk Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak, dan Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms dan Tibor Feldman juga kembali memerankan peran mereka sebagai вҖңLilyвҖқ dan вҖңIrvвҖқ dari film pertama.

вҖңThe Devil Wears Prada 2вҖқ diproduseri oleh Wendy Finerman, dan diproduseri eksekutif oleh Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt, dan Aline Brosh McKenna. Film ini tayang perdana secara eksklusif di bioskop pada 1 Mei.

de-DE.title: Der Teufel trГӨgt Prada 2 | Offizieller Trailer
de-DE.description:
Alle wollen das sehen.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt und Stanley Tucci kehren in вҖһDer Teufel trГӨgt Prada 2вҖң zurГјck вҖ“ ab 1. Mai im Kino. Jetzt den kompletten Trailer ansehen.

Fast 20 Jahre nach ihrem legendГӨren Auftritt als Miranda, Andy, Emily und Nigel kehren Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt und Stanley Tucci in die modischen StraГҹen von New York City und die eleganten BГјros des Runway Magazine zurГјck вҖ“ in der mit Spannung erwarteten Fortsetzung des PhГӨnomens von 2006, das eine ganze Generation prГӨgte.

Der Film vereint die Originalbesetzung mit Regisseur David Frankel und Drehbuchautorin Aline Brosh McKenna und prГӨsentiert eine komplett neue Riege an Charakteren, darunter Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak und Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms und Tibor Feldman kehren in ihren Rollen als вҖһLilyвҖң und вҖһIrvвҖң aus dem ersten Film zurГјck.

вҖһDer Teufel trГӨgt Prada 2вҖң wurde von Wendy Finerman produziert, die ausfГјhrende Produktion Гјbernahmen Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt und Aline Brosh McKenna. Der Film startet am 1. Mai exklusiv in den Kinos.

en.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Official Trailer
en.description:
Everybody wants this. 

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci return in The Devil Wears Prada 2, in theaters May 1. Watch the full trailer now. 

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and NigelвҖ”Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as вҖңLilyвҖқ and вҖңIrvвҖқ from the first film. 
 
вҖңThe Devil Wears Prada 2вҖқ is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

snippet.title: Gandhi Talks Trailer | Vijay S | Arvind S | Aditi Rao | A.R.Rahman | Siddharth J |  Releasing 30 Jan
snippet.description:
Not every story needs words.
Some are meant to be felt.

This time, the screen doesn't talk. It makes you listen.

Gandhi Talks, releasing in cinemas worldwide on the 30th of January.

Cast - Vijay Sethupathi, Arvind Swami, Aditi Rao Hydari, Siddharth Jadhav

An A.R. Rahman Musical 

Writer & Director - Kishor Pandurang вҖҳBelekarвҖҷ
Producers: Rajesh Kejriwal, Gurpal Sachar
Producers: Umesh Kumar Bansal, Meerra Chopraa, Kishor P Belekar
Co-Producer: Anil Bhandari 
Production House - Zee Studios, Kyoorius, Pincmoon & Moviemill Entertainment
Creative Producer - Nisheeth Chandra
Associate Producer - Deepak R. Nangalia
Director Of Photography - Karan B. Rawat
Production Designer - Durgaprasad Mahapatra
Costume Designers - Neetu Bharadwaj, Priyanka Dubey, Kavitha

Music Supervisor - Shubham Bhat
Makeup Designer - Rohit Mahadik 
Editor - Ashish Mhatre
VFX - Postmen Studios
DI - Prime Focus Ltd.

Post-Production Head - Paras Fulambarkar
Background score Mixed by Suresh Permal

#Maatrubhumi Song Out Now!
#SalmanKhan #BattleOfGalwan

snippet.title: Ekdev Limbu - Mana Ko Haal [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Mana Ko Haal is a heartfelt portrayal of love, vulnerability, and the unspoken emotions that live quietly within us. Through raw melodies and sincere lyrics, we have tried to capture the fragile state of a heart caught between longing, hope, and truth. The visuals mirror this emotional journey, bringing to life moments of connection, distance, and reflection that many hearts will recognize as their own. 

Follow Ekdev:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ekdev.limbu/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EkdevLimbuThegim/

Listen to "Mana Ko Haal" now: https://ffm.to/manakohaal

Credits

Cast: Mahek Shrestha

Audio Credits : 
Music Producer: Saswot Shrestha (Omniphonics Studio)
Mix and Master : Saswot Shrestha
Additional Composition / Lyrics: Dechen Phinasa, Salin Magar (Hook Studio)
Guitar: Bishal Chhetri, Bibek Rai
Drums: Neepesh Pariyar
Keys: Santosh Tamang

Video Credits : 
Directed by: Abhi Sampang Rai and Pragya Rai 
DOP: Ashesh Limbu, Prabin Mahato, Yogesh Rai (Chronicle Films)

Media Partner: Routine Of Nepali Music

Digital Manager: Ashim KC
For Business/Licensing inquiries: ekdevlimbu@gmail.com

The visuals mirror this emotional journey, bringing to life moments of connection, distance, and reflection that many hearts will recognize as their own.

snippet.title: аӨ•аӨІаӨҜаҘҒаӨ— аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ 2 | Guddu Rangila аӨ•аӨҫ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ 2026 | Kalyug Ke Holi 2 - New Bhojpuri Holi Song
snippet.description:
аӨ¬аҘҒаӨ°аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘӢ аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ "аӨ№аҘӢаӨІаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ°аӨӮаӨ— аӨЎаӨҫаӨҮаӨ®аӨӮаӨЎ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨҫаӨ° аӨ—аҘҒаӨЎаҘҚаӨЎаҘӮ аӨ°аӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨІаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨҳ" 
аӨӯаӨ°аӨӘаҘӮаӨ° аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аҘҖ аӨӨаӨЎаӨјаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҶ аӨ—аӨҮаӨІ аӨ¬аӨҫаҘӨ
аӨ–аҘӮаӨ¬ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝ аӨңаӨҫ аӨҶ аӨўаҘҮаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨҶ аӨҶаӨ¶аҘҖаӨ°аҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨҰ аӨҰаҘҖаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ рҹ”Ҙ

snippet.title: Qubool (Full Video) | Haq | Vishal Mishra | Armaan Khan | Yami Gautam & Emraan Hashmi | Hindi Song
snippet.description:
Times Music presents the official full video song вҖңQuboolвҖқ from the movie Haq. With heartfelt lyrics & soulful vocals, Qubool captures the raw essence of love.

Whether you're in love, healing, or simply a fan of meaningful love songs, 'Qubool' is a song that speaks to the heart. It's the kind of track youвҖҷll want to put on repeat.

#Qubool #HAqSongs #LoveSong #RomanticSong #NewSong #TrendingSong #YamiGautam #EmraanHashmi #VishalMishra #ArmaanKhan #QuboolHai #NewTrendingSong  #DekhoZaraDekhoNaamTeraLikhaHai

рҹ‘үрҹҸ» SUBSCRIBE to Times Music - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

Like || Share || Spread || Love

https://youtube.com/@timesmusicindia

Cast- Yami Gautam, Emraan Hashmi, Vartika Singh, Danish Husain, Sheeba Chadha, Aseem Hattangady
Directed by- Suparn S Varma
Produced by- Vineet Jain
Produced by- Vishal Gurnani, Juhi Parekh Mehta, Harman Baweja
Co-Produced by- Amrita Pandey, Suparn S Varma, Rowena Baweja, Sandeep Singh
Written by- Reshu Nath | Music by - Vishal Mishra

Song Credits 
Composer : Vishal Mishra
Lyrics : Kaushal Kishore
Singer : Armaan Khan 
Arrangement & Production : Vishal Mishra
Music Production by : Gaurav Vaswani
Additional Production : Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah
Additional Vocals - Vishal Mishra 
Music Assistant : Kumar Gaurav Singh, Trihangku Lahkar, Bitupon Boruah
Mixed & Mastered by : Trihangku Lahkar @VMS

Bass : Aalaap Raju
Strokes : Tapas Roy
Acoustic Guitar : Kandarpa Kalita
Live Rhythm Arranged by : Prashant Sonagra & Swaranjay Dhumal
Tabla : Prashant Sonagra
Dholak : Mushtak Khan & Ishteyak Khan
Percussions : Swaranjay Dhumal, Prashant Sonagra, Harsh Bhoir & Mohit Kathak

Live Rhythms, Strokes Recorded at YRF Studio by : Vijay Dayal, Sagar Sathe
Guitars, Vocals Recorded at VMS by : Trihangku Lahkar & Bitupon Boruah

Lyrics Of Song вҖҳQuboolвҖҷ
 
Mila Asmaan Se Koi Noor Kohinoor Dastoor Mera
Lo Aaj Se Hua Main Sadiyon Ko Tera
 
Dekho Zara Dekho Naam Tera Likha Hai
Mera Hai Jo Mera Sab Tera Ho Chuka Hai
 
Dil Pe Ab Na Zor Koi
Har Qadam Teri Or Hai
Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Ab Phool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
Har Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Qubool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho

Qubool Teri Zid Hai Saari
Saari Baatein Qubool Hain
Qubool Saare Din Tumhaare
Siyah Raatein Qubool Hain
 
Tu Saaye-Baan Tu, Teri Chaanv Mein Khud Ko Bhulakar Jhoom Loon
Yoon Tera Hoon, Tu Dard De To Dard Ko Bhi Choom Loon
Muskuraana Hai Tujhi Se Tujhse hi Aaraam hai
Tu Nahi To Main Nahi Hoon
Zindagi Tere Naam Hai
Tu Na To Main Bemaaine
Hona Mera Hi Fizool Hai
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
 
Hai Ishq Mein Jab Doobe Hum
Gham Bhi Mile To Kaisa Gham
Tera Sahi Tera Ghalat
Tera Jhooth Bhi To Qubool Hai
Accha Bura Kya Tolna
Kya Mashwara Kya Sochna
Mahboob Hota Hai Khuda
Yahi Ishq Ka To Usool Hai

Dekho Zara Dekho Naam Tera Likha Hai
Mera Hai Jo Mera Sab Tera Ho Chuka Hai
 
Dil Pe Ab Na Zor Koi
Har Qadam Teri Or Hai
Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Ab Phool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
Har Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Qubool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho

Qubool Teri Zid Hai Saari
Saari Baatein Qubool Hain
Qubool Saare Din Tumhaare
Siyah Raatein Qubool Hain
 
Tu Saaye-Baan Tu, Teri Chaanv Mein Khud Ko Bhulakar Jhoom Loon
Yoon Tera Hoon, Tu Dard De To Dard Ko Bhi Choom Loon
Muskuraana Hai Tujhi Se Tujhse hi Aaraam hai
Tu Nahi To Main Nahi Hoon
Zindagi Tere Naam Hai
Tu Na To Main Bemaaine
Hona Mera Hi Fizool Hai
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
 
Hai Ishq Mein Jab Doobe Hum
Gham Bhi Mile To Kaisa Gham
Tera Sahi Tera Ghalat
Tera Jhooth Bhi To Qubool Hai
Accha Bura Kya Tolna
Kya Mashwara Kya Sochna
Mahboob Hota Hai Khuda
Yahi Ishq Ka To Usool Hai

Roshan Devkota
Sarjan Thapa Magar / Puran Magar & Team
Shailesh Sunam & Umbrella Resort, Manungkot

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

бҙ„бҙҸбҙҳКҸКҖЙӘЙўКңбҙӣ бҙ…ЙӘsбҙ„КҹбҙҖЙӘбҙҚбҙҮКҖ бҙңЙҙбҙ…бҙҮКҖ sбҙҮбҙ„бҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ 107 бҙҸТ“ бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҳКҸКҖЙӘЙўКңбҙӣ бҙҖбҙ„бҙӣ 1976 бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙҖКҹКҹбҙҸбҙЎбҙҖЙҙбҙ„бҙҮ бҙЎбҙҖs бҙҚбҙҖбҙ…бҙҮ Т“бҙҸКҖ ''Т“бҙҖЙӘКҖ бҙңsбҙҮ''  Т“бҙҸКҖ бҙҳбҙңКҖбҙҳбҙҸsбҙҮ sбҙңбҙ„Кң бҙҖs бҙ„КҖЙӘбҙӣЙӘбҙ„ЙӘsбҙҚs бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҚбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ ЙҙбҙҮбҙЎs КҖбҙҮбҙҳбҙҸКҖбҙӣЙӘЙҙЙў бҙӣбҙҮбҙҖбҙ„КңЙӘЙҙЙў sбҙ„КңбҙҸКҹбҙҖКҖsКңЙӘбҙҳ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… КҖбҙҮsбҙҮбҙҖКҖбҙ„Кң Т“бҙҖЙӘКҖ бҙңsбҙҮ ЙӘs бҙҖ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҳКҸКҖЙӘЙўКңбҙӣ КҹбҙҖбҙЎ бҙӣКңбҙҖбҙӣ бҙЎЙӘКҹКҹ бҙЎЙӘКҹКҹ бҙҸбҙӣКңбҙҮКҖбҙЎЙӘsбҙҮ КҷбҙҮ ЙӘЙҙТ“КҖЙӘЙҙЙўЙӘЙҙЙў ЙҙбҙҸЙҙ-бҙҳКҖбҙҸТ“ЙӘбҙӣ бҙҮбҙ…бҙңбҙ„бҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ бҙҸКҖ бҙҳбҙҮКҖsбҙҸЙҙбҙҖКҹ бҙңsбҙҮ ЙӘТ“ КҸбҙҸбҙң КңбҙҖбҙ бҙҮ бҙҖЙҙКҸ бҙҳКҖбҙҸКҷКҹбҙҮбҙҚ бҙ„бҙҸЙҙбҙӣбҙҖбҙ„бҙӣ бҙңs бҙЎбҙҮ бҙЎЙӘКҹКҹ КҖбҙҮбҙҸбҙҚбҙ бҙҮ бҙҸбҙңКҖ бҙ ЙӘбҙ…бҙҮбҙҸ бҙ…бҙҸЙҙ'бҙӣ ЙўЙӘбҙ бҙҮ КңбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ бҙӣКңбҙҖЙҙбҙӢs

Rabb maan liya tujhko 
Jagg maan liya tujhko 
Tu he hai dunia meri 
Sabb maan liya tujhko,,

Maanga  jo paaya vahi  ,,

Dekh tere dil may 
Dil may dil may 
Dil may dil may yaara  toh nhi
Mai khogea khogea khogea khogea yaara hu kahi ,,

Bachkay ray bachkay deewane,,
Tu naino kay khel na jaane ,,


Tu meri jaan hai yaara ,,
Tu he hai jaan say pyara ,,
Sunali ve Sunlai ve dildara
Dhadkan banke rehna yaara ,,
Apna mujhey kehna yaara ,
Sunali ve Sunlai ve dildara ,

Tujhey yaar kahay
Jisay pyaar kahay 
Humey toh hogea hai vahi , 

Dekh tere dil may 
Dil may dil may 
Dil may dil may yaara  toh nhi
Mai khogea khogea ,,
khogea khogea khogea yaara hu kahi ,,

#teredilmein #elvishyadav #elvish #jannat #jannatzubair #ritoriba

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвҖҷs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вҖ” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вҖ” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вҖңCapture the FlagвҖқ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вҖңRobuxвҖқ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.description:

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
A club isn't the best place to find a lover
So the bar is where I go (Mm)
Me and my friends at the table doin' shots
Drinkin' fast and then we talk slow (Mm)
And you come over and start up a conversation with just me
And trust me, I'll give it a chance now (Mm)
Take my hand, stop, put Van the Man on the jukebox
And then we start to dance, and now I'm singin' like

[Pre-Chorus]
Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
I may be crazy, don't mind me
Say, "Boy, let's not talk too much"
Grab on my waist and put that body on me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
Come, come on now, follow my lead, mm

[Chorus]
I'm in love with the shape of you
We push and pull like a magnet do
Although my heart is fallin' too
I'm in love with your body
And last night, you were in my room
And now my bed sheets smell like you
Every day, discoverin' somethin' brand new
Well, I'm in love with your body

[Post-Chorus]
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Every day, discoverin' somethin' brand new
I'm in love with the shape of you

[Verse 2]
One week in, we let the story begin
We're goin' out on our first date (Mm)
You and me are thrifty, so go all-you-can-eat
Fill up your bag and I fill up a plate (Mm)
We talk for hours and hours about the sweet and the sour
And how your family is doin' okay (Mm)
And leave and get in a taxi, and kiss in the back seat
Tell the driver make the radio play and I'm singin' like

[Pre-Chorus]
Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
I may be crazy, don't mind me
Say, "Boy, let's not talk too much"
Grab on my waist and put that body on me
Well, come on now, follow my lead

[Chorus]

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 5 Hunters REVIVAL
snippet.description:
You voted for it. Time to take on 5 hunters. The hunters are back and better than ever. Will we AT LAST move on to 6 hunters?

Follow my socials:
вһҪ Twitter - @dream
вһҪ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
вһҪ Snapchat - @dream

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 

Seed: 935327412
Version: 1.21.11

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there is FIVE hunters. The 6th rendition of the 5 hunters series, the revival...

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friends George and Sapnap and BadBoyHalo and Antfrost  and Awesamdude try to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

(Most) Music is from: @dreamproductionsXD 

#MinecraftManhunt

bn.title: аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«а§ҚаҰҹ аҰёа§ҚаҰӘа§ҖаҰЎ аҰ°аҰҫаҰЁаҰҫаҰ° аҰ“ а§« аҰ№аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° аҰӘа§ҒаҰЁаҰ°аҰІаҰЎаҰјаҰҫаҰҮ
bn.description:
аҰӨа§ӢаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҸаҰ° аҰңаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜ аҰӯа§ӢаҰҹ аҰ•аҰ°а§ҮаҰӣа§ӢаҘӨ аҰёаҰ®аҰҜаҰј аҰҸаҰёа§ҮаҰӣа§Ү а§« аҰ№аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° аҰ¬аҰҝаҰ°а§ҒаҰҰа§ҚаҰ§а§Ү аҰІаҰЎаҰјаҰҫаҰҮ аҘӨ аҰ№аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ°аҰ°аҰҫ аҰ«а§ҮаҰ°аҰӨ аҰҸаҰёа§ҮаҰӣа§Ү аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰҶаҰ—а§ҮаҰ° аҰҡа§ҮаҰҜаҰја§Ү аҰ¶аҰ•а§ҚаҰӨаҰҝаҰ¶аҰҫаҰІа§Җ аҰ№аҰҜаҰја§Ү аҘӨ аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰ•аҰҝ аҰёаҰ°а§ҚаҰ¬аҰ¶а§ҮаҰ·а§Ү а§¬ аҰ№аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° аҰҰаҰҝаҰ•а§Ү аҰҸаҰ—а§ӢаҰ¬а§Ӣ?

аҰҶаҰ¬аҰҫаҰ° аҰёа§ӢаҰ¶а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІ аҰ«аҰІа§Ӣ аҰ•аҰ°а§Ӣ:

аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҸ аҰёаҰҝаҰ°аҰҝаҰңаҰ•а§Ү аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«а§ҚаҰҹ аҰ®а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁаҰ№аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹ аҰ¬аҰІаҰҫаҰ° аҰёаҰҝаҰҰа§ҚаҰ§аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ аҰЁаҰҝаҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣаҰҝаҘӨ аҰҸаҰҮ аҰӯаҰҝаҰЎаҰҝаҰ“ аҰӨаҰҫаҰ°аҰҮ аҰӘа§ҒаҰЁаҰ° аҰҡа§ҮаҰ·а§ҚаҰҹаҰҫ, аҰҜа§ҮаҰ–аҰҫаҰЁа§Ү а§« аҰңаҰЁ аҰ№аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ° аҰҶаҰӣа§ҮаҘӨ а§« аҰ№аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰҹаҰҫаҰ°а§ҮаҰ° аҰ·аҰ·а§ҚаҰ  аҰ–а§ҮаҰІаҰҫ аҰӘа§ҒаҰЁаҰ°аҰІаҰЎаҰјаҰҫаҰҮ...

аҰҸаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ®аҰҫаҰҮаҰЁаҰ•а§ҚаҰ°аҰҫаҰ«аҰҹ аҰ•аҰҝаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨа§Ғ, а§§.а§Ёа§§.а§§а§§ аҰҸаҰ° аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҝ аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІа§ҮаҰһа§ҚаҰң аҰҜаҰҫ аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҫаҰ° аҰёаҰҝаҰҰа§ҚаҰ§аҰҫаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ аҰЁаҰҝаҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣаҰҝ аҘӨ аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰ—а§ҮаҰ®аҰҹаҰҝ аҰ№аҰҫаҰ°аҰҫаҰЁа§ӢаҰ° аҰҡа§ҮаҰ·а§ҚаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°аҰ¬аҘӨ аҰҜаҰ–аҰЁ аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰ° аҰ¬аҰЁа§ҚаҰ§а§Ғ аҰңаҰ°а§ҚаҰң, аҰёа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰӘаҰЁа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰӘ, аҰ¬а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЎаҰ¬аҰҮаҰ№а§ҮаҰІа§Ӣ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ аҰ…а§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰЁаҰ«а§ҚаҰ°аҰёа§ҚаҰҹ аҰҶаҰ®аҰҫаҰ•а§Ү аҰҘаҰҫаҰ®аҰҫаҰЁа§ӢаҰ° аҰҡа§ҮаҰ·а§ҚаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°аҰ¬а§ҮаҘӨ аҰҸаҰҹаҰҫ аҰҸаҰ•аҰҹаҰҫ аҰӘа§ҚаҰ°аҰӨаҰҝаҰҜа§ӢаҰ—аҰҝаҰӨаҰҫ аҰҸаҰ¬аҰӮ вҖҢ аҰҸаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ…аҰӨа§ҚаҰҜаҰЁа§ҚаҰӨ аҰӨа§ҒаҰ–а§ӢаҰ° аҰҶаҰ° аҰҶаҰ®аҰ°аҰҫ аҰҸаҰҹаҰҫ аҰ•аҰ°а§Ү аҰ…аҰЁа§ҮаҰ• аҰ®аҰңаҰҫ аҰӘа§ҮаҰҜаҰја§ҮаҰӣаҰҝаҰІаҰҫаҰ® аҘӨ аҰҶаҰ®аҰҝ аҰҸаҰ°аҰ•аҰ® аҰҡа§ҚаҰҜаҰҫаҰІа§ҮаҰһа§ҚаҰң аҰ•аҰ°аҰӨа§Ү аҰӘаҰӣаҰЁа§ҚаҰҰ аҰ•аҰ°аҰҝаҘӨ

а°Үа°Ұа°ҝ а°•аұҠа°ӨаұҚа°Ө Minecraft а°•а°ҫа°ЁаұҖ, 1.21.11 а°ёа°өа°ҫа°ІаұҒа°ЁаұҒ а°®аұҮа°®аұҒ а°ӘаұҚа°°а°Ҝа°ӨаұҚа°Ёа°ҝа°Ӯа°ҡа°ҫа°Іа°Ёа°ҝ а°Ёа°ҝа°°аұҚа°Ја°Ҝа°ҝа°Ӯа°ҡаұҒа°•аұҒа°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°ҫа°®аұҒ. а°ЁаұҮа°ЁаұҒ а°Ҷа°ҹа°ЁаұҒ а°“а°Ўа°ҝа°Ӯа°ҡа°Ўа°ҫа°Ёа°ҝа°•а°ҝ а°ӘаұҚа°°а°Ҝа°ӨаұҚа°Ёа°ҝа°ёаұҚа°Өа°ҫа°ЁаұҒ, а°…а°Ҝа°ҝа°ӨаұҮ а°Ёа°ҫ а°ёаұҚа°ЁаұҮа°№а°ҝа°ӨаұҒа°ІаұҒ а°ңа°ҫа°°аұҚа°ңаұҚ а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°ёа°ӘаұҚа°Ёа°ҫа°ӘаұҚ а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°¬а°ҫа°ЎаұҚвҖҢа°¬а°ҫа°ҜаұҚвҖҢа°№а°ҫа°ІаұӢ а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°Ҷа°Ӯа°ҹаұҚвҖҢа°«аұҚа°°а°ҫа°ёаұҚа°ҹаұҚ а°Ёа°ЁаұҚа°ЁаұҒ а°ҰаұҖа°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°ҝ а°ҡаұҮа°Ҝа°•аұҒа°Ӯа°Ўа°ҫ а°Ёа°ҝа°°аұӢа°§а°ҝа°Ӯа°ҡа°Ўа°ҫа°Ёа°ҝа°•а°ҝ а°ӘаұҚа°°а°Ҝа°ӨаұҚа°Ёа°ҝа°ёаұҚа°Өа°ҫа°°аұҒ. а°Үа°Ұа°ҝ а°’а°• а°°аұҮа°ёаұҒ, а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°Үа°Ұа°ҝ а°ҡа°ҫа°Іа°ҫ а°ӨаұҖа°өаұҚа°°а°®аұҲа°Ёа°Ұа°ҝ а°®а°°а°ҝа°ҜаұҒ а°®аұҮа°®аұҒ а°ҡа°ҫа°Іа°ҫ а°Ёа°өаұҚа°өаұҒа°•аұҒа°ЁаұҚа°Ёа°ҫа°®аұҒ. а°Ёа°ҫа°•аұҒ а°Ҳ а°ёа°өа°ҫа°іаұҚа°Іа°ЁаұҒ а°ҡаұҮа°Ҝа°Ўа°Ӯ а°ҡа°ҫа°Іа°ҫ а°Үа°·аұҚа°ҹа°Ӯ.

After intense battles, clutch plays, and shifting leaderboards, teams are stepping in with momentum, pressure, and everything to prove.

snippet.title: Live Dohori Nepali | "аӨҡаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаҘҲ аӨЁаӨ—аӨ° "Chintai Nagara - Shiva Hamal & Sita Shrestha
snippet.description:
Presenting the authentic Nepali Live Dohori song "Chintai Nagara" By Shiva Hamal & Sita Shrestha, brought to you by Music Nepal.

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats. Enjoy the real taste of Nepali folk, Dohori, and regional music heritage.
Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music NepalвҖҷs timeless Lok Geet collection.

аӨІаӨҫаӨҲаӨӯ аӨҰаҘӢаӨ№аҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаҘҮаӨӘаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨІаҘӢаӨ•аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҲаӨӯаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨңаҘҖаӨөаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨ аӨ° аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ®аӨ• аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨ°аҘӮаӨӘаӨ№аӨ°аҘӮаӨ®аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ№аҘӢ, аӨңаӨёаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨөаӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨөаӨҝаӨ• аӨёаӨ®аӨҜаӨ®аӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҒаӨӨ аӨ—аӨ°аӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨӣ аӨ° аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨ•аӨ№аӨ°аҘӮаӨІаҘҮ аӨӘаӨЁаӨҝ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҜаӨғ аӨёаӨ№аӨӯаӨҫаӨ—аӨҝаӨӨаӨҫ аӨңаӨЁаӨҫаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаӨЁаҘҚаҘӨ аӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘҒаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ№аҘӢаӨҮаӨЁвҖ”аӨҜаҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘғаӨӨаӨҝаӨ• аӨёаӨӮаӨөаӨҫаӨҰ аӨ№аҘӢ, аӨңаӨёаӨІаҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨ§аӨҝ, аӨӨаӨҫаӨІ, аӨ° аӨ•аӨҘаӨҫаӨөаӨҫаӨҡаӨЁаӨІаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ®аӨҝаӨёаӨҫаӨүаӨҒаӨӣаҘӨ

ne.title: Live Dohori Nepali | "аӨҡаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨӨаҘҲ аӨЁаӨ—аӨ° "Chintai Nagara - Shiva Hamal & Sita Shrestha
ne.description:
Presenting the authentic Nepali Live Dohori song "Chintai Nagara" By Shiva Hamal & Sita Shrestha, brought to you by Music Nepal.

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats. Enjoy the real taste of Nepali folk, Dohori, and regional music heritage.
Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music NepalвҖҷs timeless Lok Geet collection.

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Lopchu ko Orali (Official Visualiser)
snippet.description:
Lopchu, a small village in the Darjeeling hills, apart from its famous tea gardens is familiar to us as a spot to stop and relax for a bit while we journey on to various other places and journeys in life. So, even if it is for this brief moment, we give pause amongst mist, slow mornings, deep green slopes, and that calm, slightly melancholic beauty you only get in such mountain places. It carries a sense of stillness and depth, like something that doesnвҖҷt rush to explain itself. It belongs to memory.

Now streaming on all platforms.

MUSIC
Bipul Chettri - Vocals, Electric Guitar, Acoustic Guitar, Backing Vocals
Rahul Rai - Bass
Shantanu Sudarshan - Drums, Percussions
Prince Nepali - Sarangi, Tungna, Madal
Anindo Bose - Organ
Blue Notes School of Music Ensemble - Backing Vocals

Recorded by Jonty Indra, Anindo Bose & Binaya Man Amatya
Mixed & Mastered by Binaya Man Amatya

Lyrics, Composition & Arrangement - Bipul Chettri
Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

A Video by Gundruk

Shot by Pemba Tshering Tamang & Akash Pradhan

In Appearance
Sujit Subba, Palzer Lama, Passang Lamu Sherpa, Pratibha Subba, Aryan Rai, Jorden Sherpa, Nehal Pradhan

Drone video by Abhishek Painkra (abi_isiwaqt)
Trip managed by Trail Begins

We would like to extend our very special thanks to:
The Mukhian Homestay, Lopchu, Anmol Mukhia, Aaku Pema Dukpa & the amazing people of Lopchu.

All Rights Reserved by Bipul Chettri. 2026.

snippet.title: I Explored the Minecraft Farlands
snippet.description:
the end of the world

I Explored the Minecraft Farlands

Unstable SMP:
вһң  @FlameFragsMC 
вһң  вҒЁ@Spokeishere 
вһң  @ParrotX2 
вһң  вҒЁ@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (all of the minecraft theme remixes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack - Enderal Soundtrack - Extended (HQ): Cycle - Zyklus https://youtu.be/5Xx4rNUey90 by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

we wa we wa

snippet.title: Lord Huron - The Night We Met (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
вҸ¬ Download / Stream: 
http://smarturl.it/iLHStrangeTrails

вҡЎпёҸ Lord Huron:
https://www.instagram.com/lordhuron
https://www.facebook.com/lordhuron
https://x.com/lordhuron

вҡЎпёҸ Creative Chaos:
https://soundcloud.com/creativchaos
https://open.spotify.com/user/creativchaos
https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Intro]
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)

[Verse 1]
I am not the only traveler
Who has not repaid his debt
I've been searching for a trail to follow again
Take me back to the night we met
And then I can tell myself
What the hell I'm supposed to do
And then I can tell myself
Not to ride along with you

[Chorus]
I had all and then most of you
Some and now none of you
Take me back to the night we met
I don't know what I'm supposed to do
Haunted by the ghost of you
Oh, take me back to the night we met

[Verse 2]
When the night was full of terrors
And your eyes were filled with tears
When you had not touched me yet
Oh, take me back to the night we met

[Chorus]
I had all and then most of you
Some and now none of you
Take me back to the night we met
I don't know what I'm supposed to do
Haunted by the ghost of you
Take me back to the night we met

Lyrics for Shape Of You - Ed Sheeran:

[Verse 1]
A club isn't the best place to find a lover
So the bar is where I go (Mm)
Me and my friends at the table doin' shots
Drinkin' fast and then we talk slow (Mm)
And you come over and start up a conversation with just me
And trust me, I'll give it a chance now (Mm)
Take my hand, stop, put Van the Man on the jukebox
And then we start to dance, and now I'm singin' like

[Pre-Chorus]
Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
I may be crazy, don't mind me
Say, "Boy, let's not talk too much"
Grab on my waist and put that body on me
Well, come on now, follow my lead
Come, come on now, follow my lead, mm

[Chorus]
I'm in love with the shape of you
We push and pull like a magnet do
Although my heart is fallin' too
I'm in love with your body
And last night, you were in my room
And now my bed sheets smell like you
Every day, discoverin' somethin' brand new
Well, I'm in love with your body

[Post-Chorus]
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Oh, I, oh, I, oh, I, oh, I
Well, I'm in love with your body
Every day, discoverin' somethin' brand new
I'm in love with the shape of you

[Verse 2]
One week in, we let the story begin
We're goin' out on our first date (Mm)
You and me are thrifty, so go all-you-can-eat
Fill up your bag and I fill up a plate (Mm)
We talk for hours and hours about the sweet and the sour
And how your family is doin' okay (Mm)
And leave and get in a taxi, and kiss in the back seat
Tell the driver make the radio play and I'm singin' like

snippet.description:

Let the soulful voices of Asha Bhosle and Kumar Sanu transport you to a realm of pure emotion.

snippet.title: New Nepali Bhajan || Murali Tiriri | аӨ®аҘҒаӨ°аӨІаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ°аҘҖаӨ°аҘҖ || Suraj Bhandari, Hiralal Kandel | Pabitra & Kosh
snippet.description:
Suraj Bhandari Presents

Murali Tiriri | аӨ®аҘҒаӨ°аӨІаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ°аӨҝаӨ°аӨҝ || New Nepali Bhajan 2026 | 2082

An uplifting devotional bhajan celebrating the divine flute (Murali) of Lord Krishna, inspiring devotion, peace, and spiritual connection.

Experience the soulful voice of Suraj Bhandari as he brings the timeless devotion and melody of Murali Tiriri to life, accompanied by vibrant music and artistic choreography.

рҹҺј Bhajan Credits (Audio)

рҹҺ¶ Lyrics Title: Murali Tiriri (аӨ®аҘҒаӨ°аӨІаҘҖ аӨӨаӨҝаӨ°аӨҝаӨ°аӨҝ)
рҹҺӨ Vocal: Suraj Bhandari
рҹҺ¶ Lyrics / Melody: Hiralal Kadel
рҹҺ¶ Music Arrangement: Madhav Bhandari
рҹҺӨ Mixing / Mastering: Keshab Chhinal
рҹҺ¶ Recording Studio: Dynamic Digital Recording Studio

рҹҺ¬ Video Credits

рҹҺ¶ Artists: Pabitra Acharya, Kosh Khadka
рҹҺӨ Director / Choreographer: Pabitra Acharya
рҹҺ¶ Makeup Artist: Subash Timalsina
рҹҺ¶ Art Director: Jata Shankar Gosai
рҹҺӨ Camera: Bikash Ghimire & Team
рҹҺ¶ Jewelry Partner: The Krishmaz Collections
рҹҺ¶ Dance Team: Udharan Manch Dance Training Center

рҹҺ¶ Special Thanks:

snippet.title: Amma (аӨ…аӨ®аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ) - Full Movie HD - Rani Chatterjee, Rakesh Babu - аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ®аҘӮаӨөаҘҖ #ranichatterjee
snippet.description:
#bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri #ranichatterjee
#ranichatterjee #bhojpuri #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri #movie #full #fullmovie #film #amma 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH HIGH IQ ENTERTAINMENT LLP 

аҘһаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨ® - аӨ…аӨ®аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ

аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ  аӨҡаӨҹаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаҘҖ  , аӨ°аӨҫаӨ•аҘҮаӨ¶  аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ¬аҘӮ  , аӨ¶аҘҚаӨөаҘҮаӨӨаӨҫ  аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ , аӨ…аӨҜаӨҫаҘӣ  аӨ–аӨҫаӨЁ  ,  аӨ•аӨӮаӨҡаӨЁ  аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ  , аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ¶  аӨңаҘҲаӨё , аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘаӨҫ  аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№ , аӨөаӨӮаӨҰаӨЁаӨҫ  аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аҘҮ
аӨ¬аӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аӨІаӨҫаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° вҖ“, аӨҲаӨ¶аӨҫаӨЁ , 
аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨ• вҖ“ аӨ…аӨңаҘҖаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ°
аӨІаҘҮаӨ–аӨ• - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ
аӨёаӨӮаӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°- аӨёаӨҫаӨңаӨЁ аӨ®аӨҝаӨ¶аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ
аӨ—аҘҖаӨӨаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° - аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰ аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ, 
аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аӨІаӨЁ - аӨЁаӨҫаӨ—аҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ°
аӨӣаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аӨЁ- аӨөаӨҝаӨңаӨҜ аӨ®аӨӮаӨЎаӨІ
аӨ•аҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨ«аӨ° - аӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘӮ аӨ®аҘҒаҘҷаӨ°аҘҚаӨңаҘҖ , аӨёаҘӢаӨЁаҘӮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҖаӨӨаӨ®
аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаӨ° - аӨёаӨӮаӨңаӨҜ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ°
аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ№, аӨ…аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰ аӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨ…аӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аӨөаӨҫаӨІ
аӨ®аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨҝаӨ•,аӨёаҘ…аӨҹаҘ…аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨЁаӨ° - B4U аӨӯаҘӢаӨңаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°аҘҖ


B4U аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ, аӨЁаҘҮаӨ№аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҜ , аӨөаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨө
B4U аӨІаҘҖаӨ—аӨІ - аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ°аӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ , аӨӨаҘғаӨ·аҘҚаӨЈаӨҫ аӨӘаӨҹаҘҮаӨІ , аӨӘаҘӮаӨЁаӨ® аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҮ , аӨҶаӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨөаӨҫаӨ•аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮ вҖ“ аӨ®аҘӢаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ‘аӨ«аӨҝаӨё аӨ¬аҘүаӨҜ вҖ“ аӨ•аӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҲаӨҜаӨҫ аӨқаӨҫ
IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ -  аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё 
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ , аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨҰаҘҮаӨө аӨҹаӨҫаӨӘаӨ°аҘҮ , аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ

B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё
аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨёаӨҫаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаӨҫаӨ°

HIGH IQ аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“
аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ  - аӨёаҘҒаӨӯаӨҫаӨ· аӨҡаӨөаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨЈ
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁаҘҮаӨңаӨ° - аӨ—аҘҢаӨ°аӨө аӨүаӨ®аҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ 
аӨ°аӨ¶аҘҮаӨё аӨҸаӨӮаӨЎ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁаҘҮаӨңаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨӯаҘҖаӨ•аҘӮ аӨөаӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аӨЁаҘҮ 
аӨ…аӨ•аӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨҹаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨЈаӨөаҘҖ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ , аӨ°аӨҫаӨ№аҘҒаӨІ аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨЎаҘӮ 
аӨҡаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨ°аҘҚаӨЎ аӨ…аӨ•аӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨҹаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ№

IVY вҖ“ аӨҸаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аӨҹаҘҮаӨЁаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ -  аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё 
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҖаӨӘ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨ—аӨҫ , аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨё , аӨөаӨҝаӨӘаҘҒаӨІ аӨңаҘҲаӨЁ , аӨЁаӨҝаӨөаҘғаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҹаӨҝаӨІ , аӨ—аӨЈаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ®аӨ№аӨҫаӨҰаҘҮаӨө аӨҹаӨҫаӨӘаӨ°аҘҮ , аӨ№аӨҝаӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ¶аҘҒ аӨҡаҘҢаӨ§аӨ°аҘҖ

B4U - аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё
аӨёаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢаӨ· аӨ—аӨ°аҘҚаӨ— , аӨ°аӨөаӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаӨ° аӨёаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨөаҘҖ , аӨёаӨҫаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҲаӨІаӨҫаӨ°

HIGH IQ аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® вҖ“
аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҜаӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ  - аӨёаҘҒаӨӯаӨҫаӨ· аӨҡаӨөаҘҚаӨ№аӨҫаӨЈ
аӨӘаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁаҘҮаӨңаӨ° - аӨ—аҘҢаӨ°аӨө аӨүаӨ®аҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ¶аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫ 
аӨ°аӨ¶аҘҮаӨё аӨҸаӨӮаӨЎ аӨЎаӨҫаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁаҘҮаӨңаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨӯаҘҖаӨ•аҘӮ аӨөаӨҫаӨӮаӨ—аӨЁаҘҮ 
аӨ…аӨ•аӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨҹаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨЈаӨөаҘҖ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ , аӨ°аӨҫаӨ№аҘҒаӨІ аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨЎаҘӮ 
аӨҡаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨ°аҘҚаӨЎ аӨ…аӨ•аӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨҹаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ - аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨӯаӨҫаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨ№ 
аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ°аӨЁаӨ° аӨ¬аҘүаӨҜ - аӨЁаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаӨ•аҘҒаӨ®аӨҫаӨ° аӨёаӨөаӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨ°

Lyrics:
Jai Ho Jai Ho Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Aadi Dev Shankara
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Tere Jaap Ke Bina
(Bholenath Shankara)
Chale Ye Saans Kis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mera Karm Tu Hi Jaane
Kya Bura Hai Kya BhalaaвҖҰ
Tere Raaste Pe Main Toh
Aankh Moond Ke ChalaaвҖҰ

Tere Naam Ki Jot Ne
Saara Har Liya Tamas Mera

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvarah

Srishti Ke Janam Se Bhi
(O OвҖҰ)
Pehle Tera Vaas Tha
(O OвҖҰ)
Ye Jag Rahe Ya Naa Rahe
(O OвҖҰ)
Rahegi Teri Aastha
(O OвҖҰ)

Kya SamayвҖҰ Kya Pralay
Dono Mein Teri Mahaanta
MahaantaвҖҰ MahaantaвҖҰ

Seepiyon Ki Ontt Main
(Bholenath Shankara)
Motiyaan Ho Jis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Mere Mann Mein Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Basa Hai Uss Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mujhe Bharam Tha Jo Hai Mera
Tha Nahin Kabhi MeraвҖҰ

Arth Kya Nirarth Kya
Jo Bhi Hai Sabhi TeraвҖҰ
Tere Saamne Hai Jhuka
Mere Sar Pe Haath Rakh Tera
Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

Chandrama Lalaat Pe (O OвҖҰ)
Bhasm Hai Bhujaaon Mein (O OвҖҰ)
Vastra Baagh Chhaal Ka (O OвҖҰ)
Hai Khadau Paanv Mein (O OвҖҰ)

Pyaas Kya Ho Tujhe
Ganga Hai Teri Jataaon Mein
Jataaon MeinвҖҰ Jataaon MeinвҖҰ

Doosron Ke Waaste
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Sadaiv Hai Jiya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Maanga Kuch Kabhi Nahi
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tune Sirf Hai Diya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Samudra Manthan Ka Tha Samay Jo Aa Pada
Dwand Dono Lok Me Vish-Amrit Pe Tha Chhida
Amrit Sabhi Main Baant Ke
Pyala Vish Ka Tune Khud Piya

Namo Namo Ji Shankara

Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

snippet.title: ROAD TO 126 OVR Begins!
snippet.description:
The road to 126 OVR continues! Today, I finally assemble the dream trio: 117 Lionel Messi, 117 Cristiano Ronaldo, and 117 Ruud Gullit.

In this video, I go all-in on the TOTY Draft Packs to hunt down the best attackers in the game. My pack luck was absolutely insane. I packed 117 Cristiano Ronaldo and 117 Lionel Messi in the same recording session!

After securing the attack, I moved to the Defenders pack to find Ruud Gullit. It was a struggle (so many Van Dijk duplicates!), but we finally completed the squad.

рҹ”Ҙ PACK OPENING HIGHLIGHTS:

PACKED 117 CRISTIANO RONALDO (The Suii!) рҹҮөрҹҮ№

PACKED 117 LIONEL MESSI (The Goat!) рҹҮҰрҹҮ·

PACKED 117 VIRGIL VAN DIJK (Multiple times!) рҹҮірҹҮұ

Completing the Ruud Gullit Exchange вң…
